user.title: ESO credentials
user.description: Enter your mano.eso.lt login credentials. They will be validated before saving.

object.title: Add energy object
object.description: Enter the ESO object ID (the number from mano.eso.lt/objects/YOUR_ID). Enable 'Add another' to configure multiple objects.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your username and password.
error.confirm_contact: Login succeeded but the consumption form is not available. Please log in to mano.eso.lt and confirm your contact information first.

init.title: Update ESO settings
init.description:
Leave username/password unchanged to keep existing credentials.

Current retention is set to **{current_estimate}** across {num_objects} object(s). Enter 0 to keep data forever.

data.retention_days: Data retention in days (0 = keep forever)

retention_confirm.title: Confirm storage settings
retention_confirm.description:
Retention: **{days}**

Estimated storage for {num_objects} object(s): **{estimate}**

*(Based on 24 hourly readings × 2 series × ~80 bytes per row)*

Click Submit to save.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your username and password.
error.confirm_contact: Login succeeded but the consumption form is not available.
error.retention_invalid: Retention must be a whole number of days (0 or more).
